text:
VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 

Whether the beneficiary had at least one HRSN resolved (NN_CORE_1_RSLVD_SW) or connected with 
a community service provider (CSP) for at least one of their navigated HRSNs but had no HRSNs 
resolved (NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW) are mutually exclusive.
